settings.question: Are acoustic pods and quiet-space products OECM-eligible under Agreement 2025-470?
settings.answer: Yes. Acoustic pods, phone booths, focus-room furniture, high-back privacy seating, and soundproofing accessories in this collection are all covered under OECM Agreement 2025-470. Ontario school boards, hospitals, municipalities, colleges, and not-for-profits can purchase on an OECM purchase order — particularly useful for hybrid-work and post-renovation acoustic upgrades. Call 1-800-835-9565 or email quotes@brantbusinessinteriors.com.

settings.question: What's the difference between a phone booth, an acoustic pod, and a focus room?
settings.answer: Phone booths are single-person enclosures sized for short calls — typically standing-height or stool-seating, no desk. Acoustic pods are larger sealed units that fit one or two people with a small work surface, used for video calls or short heads-down work. Focus-room furniture suits two-to-four-person huddles where acoustic privacy matters but full enclosure isn't required. The right pick depends on the call or meeting type, the floor space available, and whether the unit needs to be relocatable. Call 1-800-835-9565 with the use case and floor space and we'll recommend a configuration.

settings.question: What do I need to plan for installing an acoustic pod?
settings.answer: Most acoustic pods plug into a standard outlet for built-in ventilation and lighting — your facilities team should confirm there's a power point near the planned location. Pods come pre-assembled or shipped in panels for on-site assembly depending on the manufacturer and the door-clearance access into your space. Lead times vary by pod size and configuration. Call 1-800-835-9565 with the room dimensions, ceiling height, and door-clearance access and we'll send a quote with a manufacturer-confirmed delivery window.

settings.question: Can acoustic pods be moved if we relocate offices?
settings.answer: Yes — most acoustic pods are designed as freestanding modular units that can be partly or fully disassembled and reassembled in a new location, which is part of why they suit leased office space and hybrid-work scenarios. The disassembly and reassembly effort varies by manufacturer and pod size; we surface that on the quote so your facilities team or move coordinator can plan ahead. Call 1-800-835-9565 if you want the relocation steps for a specific pod.

settings.hero_subtitle: Phone booths, acoustic pods, and focus room furniture for institutional open-plan environments. OECM-eligible.
settings.intro_text: Open offices are productive — until they're not. Brant Business Interiors carries phone booths, multi-person acoustic pods, and high-back privacy seating that give people a place to focus and take confidential calls. No construction required. OECM Agreement 2025-470. Quote in 1 business day.
